title: BCA Notes Management System
description: The BCA Notes Management System is a web-based platform designed to help BCA students access subject-wise notes, Previous paper questions papers semester wise. Contact Support via email, and feedback System. It is user friendly website.

title: College Management System
description: College Management System is a full stack web application that simplifies college operations such as student admission, result management. The system provides seperate dashboard for students, faculty, and admin tomanage academic activities.
